fields.label: Open Repairs
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblRepair WHERE ISNULL(sRepairClosed, 'N') != 'Y'

fields.label: Urgent Repairs
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblRepair WHERE bHotList = 1 AND ISNULL(sRepairClosed, 'N') != 'Y'

fields.label: Pending QC
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblRepairStatuses rs ON rs.lRepairStatusID = r.lRepairStatusID WHERE rs.sRepairStatus = 'Pending QC'

fields.label: Pending Ship
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblRepairStatuses rs ON rs.lRepairStatusID = r.lRepairStatusID WHERE rs.sRepairStatus = 'Pending Ship'

fields.label: Completed Today
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblRepair WHERE dtDateOut IS NOT NULL AND CAST(dtShipDate AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

fields.label: Received Today
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblRepair WHERE CAST(dtDateIn AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

fields.label: Expiring Contracts (90 days)
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblContract WHERE dtDateTermination BETWEEN GETDATE() AND DATEADD(DAY, 90, GETDATE())

fields.label: Repair List — WO#
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sWorkOrderNumber FROM tblRepair WHERE ISNULL(sRepairClosed, 'N') != 'Y' ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Repair List — Client
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 c.sClientName1 FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblDepartment d ON d.lDepartmentKey = r.lDepartmentKey LEFT JOIN tblClient c ON c.lClientKey = d.lClientKey WHERE ISNULL(r.sRepairClosed, 'N') != 'Y' ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Repair List — Status
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 rs.sRepairStatus FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblRepairStatuses rs ON rs.lRepairStatusID = r.lRepairStatusID WHERE ISNULL(r.sRepairClosed, 'N') != 'Y' ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Repair List — Days In
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 DATEDIFF(day, dtDateIn, GETDATE()) AS DaysIn FROM tblRepair WHERE ISNULL(sRepairClosed, 'N') != 'Y' ORDER BY dtDateIn DESC

fields.label: Repair List — Tech
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 t.sTechName FROM tblRepair r LEFT JOIN tblTechnicians t ON t.lTechnicianKey = r.lTechnicianKey WHERE ISNULL(r.sRepairClosed, 'N') != 'Y' ORDER BY r.dtDateIn DESC
